negative_space_spec.definition: Intentional removal of all audio signals for Δt
negative_space_spec.usage: Before the 'Drop' or at the end of a Narrative Cycle

types.void_silence: Extremely low-volume noise-floor (-48dB) + long reverb tail
types.rhythmic_gap: Missing kick on the 4th beat to create 'gravity pull'

negative_space_spec.goal: Reset the listener's ear for the next G-Inversion iteration.
